text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I was thinking of putting up my posters
for my concert here, but what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Us students are always checking here for the
latest news, so surely everyone will see it,
right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, all the students who find out they need to
take supplementary lessons will cheer up when
they see my peppy poster!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ah, but what if... I need to take
supplementary lessons too...
